text: This is arguably the biggest and best season of @runningwild we have ever done - and it’s on the biggest channel in America! Be ready… here we go @foxtv @skytv & @hulu - thank you for your belief in this show and in the power of the outdoors to challenge and build us. It was so fun to take these superstars into my office! @officiallymcconaughey @rhysiedarby @michellemonaghan @tiffanyhaddish @umathurman @elizabethbanks @machinegunkelly @kingofbingo

WE HAVE HIT NUMBER ONE!!! Sunday Times No.1 BESTSELLER! My dream is that every person on the planet gets introduced to this true, life-changing story of love, courage, sacrifice and rescue… I’m going out on a limb here (and risking looking a fool!) but I believe that after the Bible and Quran, this book can become the furthest reaching book in history! (Est. each at 5 billion and 800 million.) The competition for third place is fierce. To achieve this we have got to surpass 250 million books read. But yes, I believe we can. The top 3 books after the Bible & Quran are: The Little Prince, Harry Potter, & A Tale of Two Cities. (Do you know the order, 1,2&3?) What would it take to make ‘The Greatest Story Ever Told’ hit those numbers!? Next step, order one for yourself and a friend, and share the good news. 
We have a long way to go together but remember, it wasn’t raining when Noah built the ark! Win or lose, it’s genuinely been a life goal and life mission to write this book. If I had to pick one work achievement in my life, this would be it. #nevergiveup #sharethelove #sharethebook link in bio ps if you’ve ever read or bought a bible or a Quran, you should read this! What is inside is empowering so many people’s lives already. 💪💪💪🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻 #faith #movemountains

Clear water doesn’t mean clean water!
What's upstream? What are the conditions there?

Up this high though the risk reduces so we risked it and drank straight from the glacial source.
No hesitation from @officallymcconaughey - which tbh tells you everything about the man!

Running Wild with Matthew McConaughey. April 21st on @foxtv next day on @hulu

One reindeer. Two men. One testicle each. @officiallymcconaughey rated his testicle six out of ten and immediately started thinking about seasoning. This adventure was a fun one! Running Wild with Matthew McConaughey. April 21st. @foxtv next day on @hulu . Don't miss it.

28,000 feet. Minus 40. Fifty-five days in and nothing left in the tank.

There's a voice that shows up at moments like that. Quiet at first. Then louder. Telling you that you don't belong there. That it's over. That the sensible thing is to stop.

I've heard that voice a lot over the years. On mountains. In the water. In life.

The only thing I've ever found that works against it is a decision. A decision to take one more step.

Sometimes that's all a fire needs. One more breath and the ember flickers into flame.

Say yes. Get up. Get moving. Try again. Never say die.

Trust yourself — and that fire and spirit within — the dawn will always come.

A routine parachute jump in Southern Africa. Free fall past 4,000 feet. Then things went wrong fast. Back shattered in three places.

To this day, I still dread the roar of the wind. Every time. That hasn't changed.

But I keep going back up.

Not because the fear went away. But because I learned that the only way through is to go right through the middle. Face it. Embrace it. Make fear your friend.

My back broke. But the real part of me inside didn't. It got stronger.

Those cracks are our story.

One of my first ever corporate talks aged 28… nervous but trying to share the honest truths of real teamwork. I told the story of how I fell into a 300-foot crevasse at 20,000 feet. The ice just disappeared beneath me.

What saved me was a rope. And the trust between two people who'd been bonded together long enough to know each other completely.

People say you have to reach your summit alone. I don't believe that. I never have.

The real reason I climb, from my dad to now, has always been the same.

It's found in the bonds. Bonds make us strong. And strong teams make winning businesses. @wsbexperience

A day of catching up with stuff and training and some family time… Huckles then back to school. Then we gear up for our next few UK live shows before heading to NYC for press for @runningwild new season on @foxtv & @sky - onwards!

Served @robriggle the testicles of a fine bull. Cold. Pickled.
He wanted full the mountain man training. This was definitely part of it! Rob we love ya brother…

Running Wild. New season this week on @foxtv.

Good times, spear fishing with @anthonyanderson. I missed but he got one on his first attempt!
Respect.
New season of Running Wild. Next week on @foxtv.

When I told Bradley that this was where we'd be sleeping, he thought it insane. But like all champions he then just gets on with it and does it!
And of course, hanging bivouacs are a great way to stay safe from mountain lions!
New season of Running Wild airs Tuesday 21st on @foxtv.
